name: Memrok Memory Layer
description: Memory with judgment. A graph-based curation layer for OpenClaw, complementing built-in recall and dreaming with explicit supersession, expiry, and topic-aware selection.

dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Path to the Memrok SQLite database. Defaults under the active OpenClaw state directory at plugins/memrok/memrok.db.

scribeProvider.label: Transcript Provider
scribeProvider.help: Optional provider override for transcript scribing. Leave empty to inherit OpenClaw's active default provider.

scribeModel.label: Transcript Model
scribeModel.help: Optional model override for transcript scribing. Leave empty to inherit OpenClaw's active default model.

watchPaths.label: Watch Paths
watchPaths.help: Additional transcript paths to watch. By default Memrok uses OpenClaw's configured session directories.

bootstrap.enabled.label: Enable Bootstrap
bootstrap.enabled.help: When enabled, seed the graph from Markdown memory files before normal transcript indexing.

bootstrap.scanConfiguredAgents.label: Scan Configured Agents
bootstrap.scanConfiguredAgents.help: Include MEMORY.md and memory/ directories from discovered OpenClaw agent workspaces.

bootstrap.memoryDirs.label: Extra Memory Dirs
bootstrap.memoryDirs.help: Additional Markdown memory directories to include in bootstrap scans.

bootstrap.memoryIndexes.label: Extra Memory Indexes
bootstrap.memoryIndexes.help: Additional MEMORY.md files to include in bootstrap scans.

reflection.provider.label: Reflection Provider
reflection.provider.help: Optional provider override for reflective scribing. Leave empty to inherit the transcript/OpenClaw default provider.

reflection.model.label: Reflection Model
reflection.model.help: Optional model override for reflective scribing. Leave empty to inherit the transcript/OpenClaw default model.

dbPath.description: Path to the Memrok SQLite database. Defaults under OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR/plugins/memrok/memrok.db.

scribeProvider.description: Optional provider override for transcript scribing. Leave unset to inherit OpenClaw's default provider.

scribeModel.description: Optional model override for transcript scribing. Leave unset to inherit OpenClaw's default model.

enabled.description: Enable reflective scribing over the curated graph.

deltaPasses.description: Number of transcript scribe passes required before reflection is eligible.

cooldownHours.description: Minimum hours between reflective scribe runs.

provider.description: Optional provider override for reflection. Leave unset to inherit transcript/OpenClaw defaults.

model.description: Optional model override for reflection. Leave unset to inherit transcript/OpenClaw defaults.

enabled.description: Enable bootstrap scans over Markdown memory sources.

memoryDirs.description: Additional memory directories to include in bootstrap scans.

memoryIndexes.description: Additional MEMORY.md files to include in bootstrap scans.

scanConfiguredAgents.description: Discover configured OpenClaw agent workspaces and scan their MEMORY.md and memory/ sources.

maxAgeDays.description: Skip Markdown memory files older than this age unless forced.

delayMs.description: Delay between bootstrap file scribe calls.

watchPaths.description: Additional transcript paths to watch. By default Memrok uses OpenClaw session directories.

deltaThreshold.description: Message threshold before consolidation is eligible.

idleMinutes.description: Idle time required before transcript scribing runs.

tokenBudget.description: Maximum token budget for Memrok's injected context header.
